content_plan.strategy: Target high-volume informational keywords not yet covered by existing blog posts, with FAQ schema for PAA capture

priority_1_new_content.title: What Is the Doomsday Clock? Definition, Meaning & How It Works
secondary_keywords: how does the doomsday clock work (1K)
what does doomsday clock mean (590 / $22.50 CPC)
doomsday clock bulletin of atomic scientists (170)
why was the doomsday clock created (70)
how is the doomsday clock calculated
does the doomsday clock actually mean anything
how often does the doomsday clock change
priority_1_new_content.notes: This is the #1 gap. Covers the massive 'what is' intent cluster. Should be the definitive explainer with FAQ schema. Link to history timeline, who controls, and midnight posts.
faq_schema_questions: How does the Doomsday Clock work?
How often does the Doomsday Clock change?
Does the Doomsday Clock actually mean anything?

priority_1_new_content.title: Doomsday Clock Current Time Today (2026): Live Status & Update
secondary_keywords: doomsday clock what time is it (720)
what is the doomsday clock at today (30 / $1.56 CPC)
priority_1_new_content.notes: Massive navigational intent cluster. Should auto-update or show current setting prominently. High CPC ($9.25) suggests ad value. Link to homepage clock widget. Add structured data for current time.

priority_1_new_content.title: Doomsday Clock Timeline Graph: Every Change from 1947 to 2026
priority_1_new_content.notes: Distinct from existing history-timeline blog post — this should be a dedicated interactive chart/graph page with the TimelineChart component. Embed the existing chart with more context. Target image search too.

priority_2_new_content.title: How Climate Change Affects the Doomsday Clock
priority_2_new_content.notes: Growing interest in non-nuclear threats affecting the clock. Cover climate, AI, and biotech as newer factors. Link to 2026 and 2027 prediction posts.

priority_2_new_content.title: The Doomsday Clock During the Cold War & Cuban Missile Crisis
secondary_keywords: doomsday clock during cuban missile crisis
priority_2_new_content.notes: Historical deep-dive. The 'farthest from midnight' (1991, 17 min) and 'closest' (1953, 2 min) are strong hooks. Link to history timeline.

priority_2_new_content.title: Where Is the Doomsday Clock? Location, NYC, Union Square & More
priority_2_new_content.notes: High CPC on 'nyc' keyword. Cover the Bulletin office in Chicago, the NYC Metronome clock confusion, Union Square, and where to see it. Good for local SEO.

priority_2_new_content.title: How Long Is 89 Seconds on the Doomsday Clock in Real Time?
priority_2_new_content.primary_keyword: how long is 89 seconds on the doomsday clock
secondary_keywords: how long is 90 seconds on the doomsday clock (90)
how long is 100 seconds on the doomsday clock in real time
how long is 85 seconds on the doomsday clock
how long is a second on the doomsday clock
priority_2_new_content.notes: Complements existing '89 seconds meaning' post but addresses a different intent — people literally want to know the real-time equivalent. Explain the metaphorical nature. Strong PAA capture potential.

priority_2_new_content.title: Can the Doomsday Clock Go Backwards? History of Clock Reversals
priority_2_new_content.primary_keyword: can the doomsday clock go backwards
secondary_keywords: can the doomsday clock go back
has the doomsday clock ever moved back
priority_2_new_content.notes: Strong PAA cluster. Answer is yes — it's moved back 8 times. Cover each reversal with context. Hopeful angle differentiates from doom content.

priority_2_new_content.title: Doomsday Clock 2025: The 89-Second Update Explained
secondary_keywords: what was the doomsday clock in 2025
priority_2_new_content.notes: HUGE volume (12.1K) and highest CPC ($12.78). Even though it's 2026, people are still searching 2025. Cover the Jan 2025 announcement, the move to 89 seconds, and what changed. Evergreen recap.

priority_3_content_optimizations.optimization: Add FAQ schema targeting PAA cluster: 'What does 90 seconds before midnight mean?', 'What does it mean if the Doomsday Clock is 85 seconds to midnight?', 'Why was the doomsday clock moved to 89 seconds?'
keywords_to_add: why was the doomsday clock moved to 89 seconds (20)
